summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DonatariaSAT MVP - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Successfully tested landing page, authentication, dashboard, donantes management, CFDIs with violet accent, and calendario with semáforo indicators.
passed_tests: Health endpoint responds correctly
User registration creates user and organization
User login authenticates successfully
Dashboard stats API returns KPIs
Donantes CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Donativos CRUD operations with donante linking
CFDIs creation and timbrado simulation
Fiscal obligations calendar API
Transparency reports creation and updates
Landing page loads with all sections
Login page renders with email/password form and Google button
Register page with organization name field
Registration flow redirects to dashboard
Dashboard page with KPI cards and chart
Donantes page with table and create dialog
CFDIs page with violet accent color (rgb(124, 58, 237))
Calendario page with 18 semáforo (traffic light) indicators
Navigation between all pages working
Donante creation dialog and form submission
Authentication state management
